title: Not all Columns appearing in Automation
excerpt:
Hi - I’m building an automation and the column I would like to use does not pop up while building the automation.  How did I get the one I need to be available? 
Thank you

posts.author: brianwbates (Brian Bates)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - I’m building an automation and the column I would like to use does not pop up while building the automation. How did I get the one I need to be available?

Thank you

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brianwbates

What automation are you trying to build?

Sometimes if the column does not appear, try searching for it in the search bar or select more options as shown in the below image.

I hope this helps.

image358×525 24.6 KB

Kind regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @brianwbates

What kind of column are you trying to add to your automation and what exact automation are you trying to build?

Depending on either the column you are trying to use or the type of automation recipe you are trying to build, what you’re looking to achieve might not be possible.

Looking forward to your response!

Cheers,
Jenna
